transcript: This cannot be. Calling all Autobots calling all autobots prime this is rc i have a visual what am i looking at a way home calling all autobots calling all autobots what am i doing well hell the coast is clear out here so whenever you want to slide that thing on out you good i can't i't. I can't. Like you can't drive stick or something? No, it's just, I ain't no thief. Are you having an existential crisis now? The deadline for that was when I offered you Twizzlers. This is an emergency. Can you hear me, Mirage? Roll out. Hey, who the hell was that? Yo, it's the radio, bro. This car is bugging. I'm out. Hey. Shit. Hey! Shit. Hey, you! Get out of the car! I'm trying. The car started by itself. I promise. Look, it's not working. Get on there! Yo, look, wait. What you doing? Noah, what's... Ring, ring, ring. Now that's top-tier manifestation. Juniper's driving by himself. Noah, you good? I don't know what's going on. It won't stop. Stop, stop. Why aren aren't you listening but you might want to slow down it's not me it's the cars possess you just want an adrenaline high let's do some of them breathing exercises yo i don't need no breathing exercises the car's driving by herself oh now yo reek what do we do no i cannot hear you break no i can't no no we did not no you did not sustain me Pull over! Help me! Uh-oh. Drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, drive, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, John, I got a 1037 in progress, silver Porsche. Are you serious, man? Oh, no. Oh, no. Oh no, oh no Do something, please Oh no, no, no it up, pick it up, pick it up Yo, nah! Nah, nah, nah, nah, nah, nah Come on! I'm a rocker, but you can't intervene We'll be the outcasts Come in, come in Can you hear me, Mirage? What? Come on! Nymphily, we can make it Come on, hip to hip Come on, rock with me We'll be right back. All right. I can't get with this, I can't get with that I can't go with this, it gets. Mirage, stay hidden! Mirage, don't draw any attention to yourself mirage big is just a movie you'll never be a real boy but that was fun man you're fun dude all right this is probably a lot for you huh back up oh that's with the aggression well i thought thought after the car chase we were boys. You gonna hit me? Maybe. Just like that? Hmm. Tough guy. I like that. I like it a lot. What are you? Some sort of possessed car or something? Nah, that's not real, man. I'm an alien. Like, alien like like e.t e.t the little ugly guy in the basket look at this face the name's mirage come on give me a little give me a little give me a little give me a little tap there you go now we're friends oh Oh, great. The gang's here. They're more like you? Like me? No. But be cool so they don't crush you. What? Yeah, I'd put that pipe down if I were you. Mirage, what have you done? You brought a human here? Optimus, hey! Looking good, man. Wait a second. Are those still rims? You were told to stay hidden. Right, right. Crazy coincidence. When you called all Optimus-like, Autobots, roll out! This guy was already in the car, but he's cool, so it's cool. Cool? Not cool. Who are you, human? I'm nobody. I ain't even seen nothing. I'm not even seeing anything right now. RC. Private Noah Diaz, US Army. Multiple commendations, a wizard with electronics. Huh, he's a soldier. He does not look like a soldier. I mean, you're looking pretty rough yourself. Sorry, sir. I will deal with your mistake later okay the energy surge we felt was in the 4,000 yards range which is undetectable to humans I've reconstructed the source from the energy echoes I cannot believe it it exists and it is here the the Transwok Key. It was thought to be lost thousands of years ago. It was once used to open space-time portals to Energon-rich planets throughout the universe. You mean Energon-rich planets, like Cybertron? After seven long years stranded on Earth, we finally found a way home.
